name: Velun
description: Tidally locked ice world. A mining colony bored deep into the warm side fault lines — with tunnels.

name: Mireth
description: Cracked desert plains baking under Quases' intensifying radiation.

name: Quell
description: A warm shallow ocean world. Research platforms float abandoned on the surface, slowly listing.

name: Harven
description: Methane-purple skies, breathable if you filter. The largest colonist settlement in the system.

name: Orix VII
description: Seventh of seven identical rocky bodies — scientists never understood why. The research station here was studying Quases' expansion.

name: Calwen
description: The most habitable world in the system. The colonists here were last to receive the evacuation order — they had time to bury their supplies.

name: Thrake
description: Volcanic, sulphurous, barely survivable even before the star began swelling.

name: Crael
description: Ringed world — the rings are glass shards from a shattered moon.

name: Akhemvar
description: 98° axial tilt. Perpetual twilight at the equator, violent seasonal extremes elsewhere.

name: Presso
description: High-pressure, needle rain, corrosive atmosphere. Only heavily armoured mining rigs could operate here.
